About PMR Cabinets

12+ years serving Oklahoma City and surrounding areas

PMR Cabinets started with a simple mission: to bring superior carpentry to Oklahoma City homes and businesses. Founded by a local craftsman who grew up building alongside his father, we understand the unique challenges and opportunities this region presents.

Our approach is straightforward: meticulous planning, skilled execution, and a dedication to exceeding expectations. We believe in clear communication, transparent pricing, and a commitment to delivering results that stand the test of time. We treat every project, big or small, with the same level of care and attention to detail.

We are proud to be part of the Oklahoma City community. We source local materials whenever possible, and we actively support local initiatives. We believe in giving back to the community that has supported us.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
PMR Cabinets

Trusted carpenter professionals serving Oklahoma City, OK and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
